title: Symbolic Cognition Department Opens
content:
New Department Wing
symbolic_cognition_wing.jpg

The new department will explore ritual, perception, repeated forms, and the role of symbolic systems in human thought. This initiative marks a major expansion in our cognitive research portfolio.

title: Student Transfer Program Expanded
content: Horizon has expanded its academic transfer partnerships. Students participating in private transfer arrangements may not appear in public enrollment records immediately. This program ensures candidate continuity across external partner sites.

title: Fall Semester Applications Now Open
content: Horizon Institute invites prospective students to apply for the upcoming semester. Selected applicants may receive early access to academic review tools and candidate support resources.

title: Horizon Researchers Break New Ground
content: Horizon researchers have announced new findings in cognitive resilience, memory continuity, and post-trauma identity support. The study remains under institutional review and follows all ethics guidelines.

title: Campus Renovation Project Underway
content:
West Campus Renovations
west_campus_renovation.jpg

Renovations continue across west campus. Temporary closures may affect access to older research facilities. Students are asked not to enter restricted corridors while structural updates are completed.
